codeReview.summary: Schema artifact is present and matches the intended foundation database setup (tables, constraints, indexes, RLS, trigger, and RPC function), with verification evidence recorded in the feature handoff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission/feature guidance references `supabase db execute`, but the installed CLI version does not provide this command in this environment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff reports successful schema application via Supabase Management API after `supabase db execute` was unavailable.

summary: Pass: required schema outcomes are verified; only tooling-guidance drift (CLI command availability) was observed.
